raw_consumer_statement: In XXXX I open a dispute for some charges from XXXX XXXX XXXX for ( XXXX XXXX ) that appeared on my credit card. I do not know who that is. I opened a dispute for XXXX amounts of {$100.00} + ( not sure of amount ) and never heard a response from Macy CC. Never got a letter or resolution in to the investigation. On XX/XX/year>, I got a call that I had been late on my payment. I was stunned. I explained to the women that I did not have any late payments or charges by that fact. I had just paid the card off on XX/XX/year> of XXXX and that there was a dispute open. She informed me that there were not those charges but XXXX other charges had come in. I told her that those were not my charges, yet again and she told me that I needed to open a dispute. I did so now the total was {$420.00}. I have not had no letter or response to those XXXX open disputes. I keep getting harassing calls that I need to give payments and that late charges have occurred. Every 3 days I get a phone call and have to repeat the same story to them. Today I called to get information on if there had been a resolution, I was transferred XXXX time to different departments, to end back at customer service. XXXX was the last person I spoke with. She informed me that in fact there was no dispute opened or action taken on my account. To find this out was highly infuriating. I explained to her that I wanted this taken care of as now it was affecting my credit score. She informed me she was going to reverse the late charges and reopen an investigation on these charges. I explained to her that I did not make those charges and that the name did not match mine for those charges to be charged to me. Please assist with this since I have been dealing with this for several month and feel unheard and harassed by Macy 's CC debt department. I am unsatisfied on how they have handled this issue.
